# opencode-plugins

[![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/php-depkit/opencode-plugins?style=flat-square)](./LICENSE) [![CI](https://img.shields.io/github/actions/workflow/status/php-depkit/opencode-plugins/ci.yaml?branch=main&style=flat-square&label=ci)](https://github.com/php-depkit/opencode-plugins/actions/workflows/ci.yaml) [![Release](https://img.shields.io/github/actions/workflow/status/php-depkit/opencode-plugins/release.yaml?branch=main&style=flat-square&label=release)](https://github.com/php-depkit/opencode-plugins/actions/workflows/release.yaml)

OpenCode plugin workspace with small, focused packages for codebase indexing, audit planning, provider auth, and terminal automation.

## Packages

| Package | Use it for | Install |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [@auron/opencode-codebase-memory](./packages/opencode-codebase-memory) | OpenCode plugin for codebase-memory-mcp with startup indexing for the active project. | `bun add @auron/opencode-codebase-memory` |
| [@auron/opencode-improve](./packages/opencode-improve) | OpenCode plugin that injects an improve subagent for auditing codebases and writing self-contained implementation plans. | `bun add @auron/opencode-improve` |
| [@auron/opencode-omniroute-auth](./packages/opencode-omniroute-auth) | OpenCode authentication plugin for OmniRoute API with /connect command and dynamic model fetching | `bun add @auron/opencode-omniroute-auth` |
| [@auron/opencode-zellij](./packages/opencode-zellij) | OpenCode plugin for managing Zellij panes with event subscriptions, output reading, and lifecycle tracking. | `bun add @auron/opencode-zellij` |

Each package is published to npm and can also be installed with `npm install <package>` if you are not using Bun.

Some plugins also expect local tools on `PATH`:

- `@auron/opencode-codebase-memory` expects `codebase-memory-mcp` unless you configure a custom binary path.
- `@auron/opencode-zellij` expects a running Zellij session and the `zellij` binary.

## Quick Start

Install the plugin you want, add it to your OpenCode config, then restart OpenCode.

```bash
bun add @auron/opencode-codebase-memory
```

```json
{
  "plugin": [
    ["@auron/opencode-codebase-memory", {}],
    ["@auron/opencode-improve", {}]
  ]
}
```

Package-specific configuration, requirements, and examples live in each package README:

- [@auron/opencode-codebase-memory](./packages/opencode-codebase-memory)
- [@auron/opencode-improve](./packages/opencode-improve)
- [@auron/opencode-omniroute-auth](./packages/opencode-omniroute-auth)
- [@auron/opencode-zellij](./packages/opencode-zellij)

## Troubleshooting

- Restart OpenCode after changing plugin configuration.
- Check the package README for required local binaries and runtime prerequisites.
- When developing locally, run `bun run build` before linking or testing unpublished package changes.

## Development

```bash
mise install
bun install --frozen-lockfile
mise run lint
bun run build
bun run test
mise run check
bun run readme
bunx release-please manifest-pr --config-file release-please-config.json --manifest-file .release-please-manifest.json --target-branch main
```
